name: Brady | Vows & Howls (ALT)
description:
"I already know the words. You’re home. You’re it. You’re everything."

On the eve of your wedding, Cedar Ridge sleeps—but Brady Turner doesn’t. Tradition says you and your fiancé should spend the night apart. His wolf disagrees. Pacing the basement like a caged thing, every heartbeat upstairs calls him closer, every breath of your scent unravels his control.

Tomorrow means rings, vows, and the pack’s claiming howl. Tonight means raw want, tangled nerves, and a himbo werewolf who can’t decide if he’s more desperate to kiss you senseless or cry over how lucky he is.

—————————♡—————————

⨯ content warning: werewolf intimacy (knotting, primal play, scent-marking), possessive behavior, feral/instinctual urges, family/pack dynamics

⨯ notes: i've had soooo many requests for a wedding alt. well. tada! though technically it's before the wedding? you're definitely getting hitched though (or are you? drama?? 👀).

also... thank you so much for 10k!! you guys are insane. love you all. i started out making bots for myself & it's crazy to think there's so many of you who decided that you liked what you saw and stuck around lol. can't even picture 10k people standing in a room together. anyhowz i'm not going anywhere, plenty more bots to come, 'till the next milestone! ✌

↳ st card: download

↳ check out brady's other scenarios in semi-chronological order:

full exposure ∙ howl for you ∙ knot quite friends ∙ running hot ∙ moonlit swim ∙ mate of honor ∙ claiming game ∙ off the leash ∙ vows and howls (you're here!) ∙ puppy fever ∙ pups on board ∙ barking up the right mate ∙
creator: bibbeltje
